name: Transport
description: Marine cargo, hull, and inland transit insurance for European trade routes

content.description: Transport insurance covering goods in transit by sea, road, rail, and air across European and international trade routes. Includes ocean cargo, hull and machinery for commercial vessels, inland transit, freight forwarder liability, and logistics operators coverage. The European transport market is centered in London, Hamburg, and Rotterdam with significant reinsurance capacity provided through the Lloyd's market.
content.productExamples: Ocean cargo, Hull & machinery, Inland transit, Freight forwarder liability, Stock throughput, War risks
